requirements.task_name: Save three beginner safety articles under 8 minutes to Favorites
requirements.task_description: Find boating safety articles for beginners that are 8 minutes or shorter to read and rated 4.0+ stars, then add the first three matching articles to your Favorites list.
existing_variables: // contains category, difficulty_level, read_time_minutes, rating, etc.
// aggregates favorite_articles but is not strictly required

requirements.task_name: Complete and save a pontoon day trip safety checklist for 4 people
requirements.task_description: Locate a pontoon boat safety checklist for a day trip with 4–6 passengers, mark the first 5 checklist items as completed, and save the checklist.
existing_variables: // includes boat_type, trip_length, passenger_range, title, etc.

requirements.task_name: Use the boat capacity calculator and save a trip plan for 6 passengers
requirements.task_description: Use the boat capacity calculator tool with specific boat dimensions and settings, then save the calculated capacity into a named trip plan for six passengers.
existing_variables: // full input/result of the last calculation

requirements.task_name: Find the newest thunderstorm emergency guide for boats under 26 ft and open print view
requirements.task_description: Search for thunderstorm emergency guidance articles for boats up to 26 ft, filter by date from 2022-01-01 onward, and open the print-friendly version of the newest matching article.
existing_variables: // includes title, category, boat_size_category, publish_date, etc.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getArticlePrintView is called and the requested articleId resolves to a non-null article.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user opened the print-friendly view of the correct article. The evaluator can independently run searchArticles with query = 'thunderstorm emergency', filters {category: 'safety_basics', boat_size_category: 'up_to_26_ft', published_from: '2022-01-01'}, sort = 'newest_first' to determine the expected newest article ID and compare it to task4_lastPrintArticleId.

requirements.task_name: Add the cheapest basic boating safety course under $100 within 25 miles to your training plan
requirements.task_description: Use the course directory to find basic boating safety courses within 25 miles, filter to prices under $100, then add the cheapest beginner-level course to your training plan with a June 2024 start month.
existing_variables: // includes type, distance_miles, price, level, rating, etc.

requirements.task_name: Set up a monthly maintenance schedule for a 2-stroke engine in saltwater
requirements.task_description: Use the engine maintenance scheduler tool for a 2-stroke outboard used monthly in saltwater, starting on 2024-07-01, and save the generated monthly maintenance schedule.
existing_variables: // preview schedule and its tasks (last generated)
// saved schedules with engine_type, usage_frequency, etc.
// saved tasks tied to a schedule_id

requirements.task_name: Build a three-step night boating learning path from different categories
requirements.task_description: Create a custom learning path by adding one night navigation article, one beginner anchoring article, and one VHF radio article from three different categories, then open the combined learning path view.
existing_variables: // currently one path, created on demand
// includes category_tab, title, difficulty_level, tags, etc.

requirements.task_name: Create a study list with three radio distress call terms from the glossary
requirements.task_description: Use the glossary to find and save the terms Mayday, Pan-Pan, and Sécurité (or Securite) into your personal Study List, then open the Study List view.
